SEARCH
Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.services

Interface LoaderPrioritySpecification<T extends com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of ObjectMapper to be compared and tested
All Superinterfaces:
Comparator<T>, Predicate<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ObjectMapperFactoryPrioritySpecification
public interface LoaderPrioritySpecification<T extends com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper> extends Comparator<T>, Predicate<T>
Represents a specification for determining the priority and applicability of ObjectMapper instances. This interface combines the functionalities of a Comparator and a Predicate to define the comparison logic for prioritizing ObjectMapper instances and the criteria to filter or test the applicability of ObjectMapper instances.

  • Method Summary
